metadata.title: Product Experiences
metadata.description: Outcome-based product experiences for the Technical Design Collaboration Platform domain, centered on authoring, review, code-connected knowledge, governance, and programmable delivery.

definitions.productBrick: A reusable implementation-facing building block used to realize one or more product experiences.
definitions.productCapability: A high-level, outcome-based experience that delivers customer or business value.

metadata.flowModelNote: Each experience carries only experience-specific flows.

capabilities.name: Draft Technical Diagram Fast
capabilities.description: Help engineers create credible technical diagrams quickly from text, templates, and direct editing.

flows.title: Draft Technical Diagram Fast
flows.description: Help engineers create credible technical diagrams quickly from text, templates, and direct editing.

steps.title: Open authoring context
keyFacts: Open authoring context is a meaningful step in the journey.
Users need fast, credible feedback here to keep momentum.
painPoints: Users stall when open authoring context feels fragmented across tools.
Confidence drops when the next state is not obvious or trusted.
